title: How to overcome the fear of public speaking
subtitle: A real story about resilience

blocks.content: The day I stepped on stage for the first time, I felt like the world stopped.
Courage is not the absence of fear, but acting in spite of it.
Most people fear public speaking more than death.
Which strategy is most effective for calming nerves before speaking in public?
Think about a moment when you faced a fear and pushed through it.
blocks.content_2: Every time you face fear, you build resilience. That courage compounds over time.
